Explanation: The question asks for the last contestant to be eliminated. Looking at the original table, the elimination order is as follows:
- Contestants eliminated in episodes 1 to 9 are not the last to be eliminated.
- In episode 10, two contestants were eliminated: Dzejlana "Lana" Baltić (1st eliminated in episode 10) and Melisa Popanicić (2nd eliminated in episode 10). 
- After these eliminations, the remaining contestants were Gina Zeneb Adamu (runner-up) and Antonia Maria Hausmair (winner).
Therefore, the last contestant to be eliminated was Melisa Popanicić, as she was the second elimination in episode 10, right before the final two contestants.
